description: Policy-Robustness Application Smoke v1 config. This applies a selected robustness audit profile to lightweight decision-log smoke records only; it does not run PPO, train policies, or change network/action-space behavior.

profiles.description: Baseline decision smoke profile using the legacy candidate ordering from Policy Decision Robustness v1.
Selected robustness-aware smoke profile using sample-quality-aware Policy Decision Robustness v1 decisions.
